name: Inventory Full Implementation
description: Complete Inventory implementation workflow: analyze warehouse needs, configure products and locations, set up routes, reordering rules, valuation, and validate with test pickings.

steps.name: Analyze Requirements
steps.description: Analyze inventory requirements: warehouses, locations, product types, tracking, valuation, routes

steps.name: Configure Warehouses & Locations
steps.description: Create warehouses, internal locations, and picking types

steps.name: Configure Products & Categories
steps.description: Create product categories with cost method and valuation; create storable products and variants

steps.name: Setup Routes & Rules
steps.description: Configure MTS/MTO routes, pull/push rules, and dropshipping if needed

steps.name: Configure Reordering Rules
steps.description: Create reordering rules for storable products and schedule procurement

steps.name: Configure Lots / Serial Tracking
steps.description: Enable lot or serial tracking and removal strategies on products and locations

steps.name: Final Validation
steps.description: Run test receipt, delivery, internal transfer, and inventory adjustment
